query: Current LMArena (lmarena.ai) Text leaderboard top rankings late June/July 2026 - which model is #1: Gemini, Claude Opus, or GPT-5.5? Recent Arena Score / Elo values for top models.
answer:
## Summary

**Who is #1 on the LMArena Text leaderboard (late June/July 2026): Claude Opus (Anthropic).**

- The official **arena.ai/lmarena.ai aggregate** shows Anthropic Claude Opus "-thinking" variants at the top of Text/Overall (claude-opus-4-6-thinking #1, claude-opus-4-7-thinking #2, claude-opus-4-8-thinking #9), with **GPT-5.2 around #14** and Grok 4.20 ~#15.
- **Gemini 3.1 Pro** and **GPT-5.2/5.5** are the top challengers, often within the 95% confidence-interval "statistical tie" on text, but **not** the outright #1.
- **GPT-5.5 is not the text #1** in any source found (OpenAI leads only some sub-boards like Arena Hard).
- Approximate top Elo band ~**1500–1546** on the standard/expert scale; third-party trackers (e.g., swfte) put Claude Opus 4.8 at ~1525 vs GPT-5.5 ~1506–1510.

**Two important caveats:**
1. The live official leaderboard pages are JS-rendered and returned **stale early-2025 cached snapshots** when fetched, so I relied on the raw aggregate ordering plus independent trackers.
2. Sources **disagree on exact Elo values** and on which Opus point-release (4.6/4.7/4.8) sits at the very top — so treat precise numbers as approximate.

**Direct answer to your question:** Among Gemini, Claude Opus, and GPT-5.5 → **Claude Opus is #1**, with Gemini 3.1 Pro and GPT-5.5 clustered just behind.

sources.title: Arena Leaderboard | Compare & Benchmark the Best Frontier AI Models (official aggregate ordering)
sources.snippet: Text/Overall raw ordering: claude-opus-4-6-thinking #1, claude-opus-4-7-thinking #2, claude-opus-4-8-thinking #9, gpt-5.2-chat-latest #14, grok-4.20-beta #15.

sources.title: LMArena Leaderboard Changelog
sources.snippet: June 2026: claude-opus-4-8 and claude-opus-4-8-thinking added June 6; claude-fable-5 June 10; changelog ends June 30, 2026.

sources.title: Live LMArena Leaderboard: Top AI Models Ranked
sources.snippet: Statistical tie at the top: Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.2 overlap within 95% CIs on text. May 2026 snapshot: Opus 4.6 ~1418, Gemini 3.1 Pro ~1406, GPT-5.2 ~1402.

sources.title: LMArena Leaderboard July 2026 | LMSys Chatbot Arena Top Models & Elo
sources.snippet: Claude Opus 4.8 #1 ~1525 Elo; GPT-5.5 Reasoning ~1510, GPT-5.5 Pro ~1506; three models above 1500 Elo; Gemini 3.1 Pro at ~1500 frontier.

sources.title: LLM Leaderboard 2026: Best AI Models Benchmark & Ranking
sources.snippet: GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Grok 4, DeepSeek V3.2 at frontier with Arena Elo ~1450-1561.

sources.title: Chatbot Arena Elo Leaderboard June 2026
sources.snippet: Arena Hard Top 15 (June 2026): #1 GPT-5.6 Pro ~1465, with Claude Opus 4.7 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 near top (a different sub-board than Text/Overall).

sources.title: Best AI Models June 2026 — Top 10 by SWE-Bench, Pricing & Context
sources.snippet: TL;DR June 16, 2026: Claude Opus 4.8 practical #1; SWE-Bench 88.6% vs GPT-5.5 82.6%.

sources.title: Best AI Models in July 2026: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & Grok
sources.snippet: Claude Sonnet 5 launched June 30, 2026 as Anthropic's new default; GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 cited as alternatives.

sources.title: LMArena Text Expert Leaderboard (returned partial/stale snapshot)
sources.snippet: Top scores ~1546-1507 dominated by Anthropic; fetched snapshot appeared partially stale (older Sonnet models).
